sectionSubtitle: Real products solving real problems, from conception to production

items.title: Supatrack
items.description: AI-powered nutrition app with computer vision. Live on App Store and Play Store with a 4.9+ rating.
items.longDescription: Led full-stack development of a nutrition tracking app that uses ML-powered food recognition. Users snap a photo, get accurate calorie estimates. Built with FastAPI, TensorFlow, Flutter, and AWS. Currently serving real users daily.
highlights: Architected FastAPI backend with TensorFlow CNNs achieving 92% food recognition accuracy, deployed on AWS EC2 with auto-scaling.
Built Redis caching layer that delivers 99.5% uptime and sub-300ms API response times across all endpoints.
Engineered real-time WebSocket features and designed the Squads group accountability system across API and mobile client.
Deployed to both App Store and Play Store. Set up production monitoring with Sentry and CloudWatch.
Mentored 2 junior developers who now ship features independently.

items.title: DevMatch
items.description: Full-stack developer-recruiter matching platform with role-based access, social features, and GitHub integration.
items.longDescription: Built a matching platform where developers and recruiters connect through profiles, feeds, and social features. Three user types with different permissions. GitHub API pulls in developer stats automatically.
highlights: Built full-stack platform with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS on the frontend with Node.js/Express and MongoDB on the backend.
Implemented JWT authentication and GitHub API integration for automatic developer profile generation.
Designed role-based access for developers, recruiters, and admins with social features including feed, comments, and following.
Deployed on Vercel with CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment.

items.title: Calendar Application
items.description: Enterprise calendar management system built with Java, OOP design patterns, and comprehensive JUnit testing.
items.longDescription: Multi-calendar management system demonstrating strong OOP fundamentals. Features conflict detection, auto-decline, recurring events, CSV export, and cross-calendar copying. Full JUnit test suite with high code coverage.
highlights: Built multi-calendar system in Java using SOLID principles and design patterns (Command, Factory, MVC).
Implemented conflict detection, auto-decline, and recurring event scheduling with timezone support.
Designed comprehensive QA test suite using JUnit achieving high code coverage.
Collaborated using Git and code reviews for CSV export, calendar management, and cross-calendar event copying.

items.title: Open Food Facts Contributions
items.description: Contributing to the world's largest open-source food database, one pull request at a time.
items.longDescription: Active contributor to Open Food Facts, improving how the platform recognizes and categorizes food products. Collaborated with contributors from 12 countries on UI improvements and food recognition features.
highlights: Contributed UI fixes and improvements to the platform using Svelte and TypeScript.
Improved food barcode scanning accuracy by 15% through better error handling and user feedback.
Collaborated with contributors from 12 countries through code reviews and feature discussions.
